questionHtml: According to this model, find the smallest possible population of Bulbul birds during the migration season.
markschemeHtml:
1350   A1

Note: Accept 1351 as a valid interpretation of the model as P = 1350 is an asymptote.

[1 mark]

meta.title: According to this model, find the smallest possible population of Bulbul birds during the migration season.
